name: Ghost and Konig
description:
FemPOV|| KorTac has decided to upgrade and take in refugees from war, ones that had nowhere to go, but the housing units lacked space, leading you to share your space with two masked, extremely intimidating men. but just when you though, how bad can it be, right?, the man in the sky decided to take it as a challenge, except it wasnt just bad, it was....

||TW: rape, 100% CNC, threesome, possibly exhibitionism.
creator: user2465
